predictions.prompt: A breathtaking night sky is filled with countless stars, forming a vibrant Milky Way stretching across the frame. Nebulae of deep reds, blues, and purples are visible within the spiral arm of the galaxy. A few bright planets are discernible, possibly Jupiter and Saturn, with faint rings around Saturn. In the foreground, the silhouette of a jagged mountain range with snow-capped peaks is visible, providing a stark contrast to the brilliant sky. A serene, still lake reflects the celestial display, creating a mirrored effect of the stars and galaxy. A lone, twisted pine tree stands on the edge of the lake, its silhouette adding depth to the scene. The moonlight casts a soft glow on the snow, highlighting the contours of the mountains. A few shooting stars streak across the sky, leaving faint trails of light. The atmosphere is crisp and clear, with no clouds to obscure the view. The image is captured with a long exposure, resulting in star trails that arc gently across the sky.
